result.stdout:
xmlcli CLI

Commands:
  version
  list-commands [--ids-only]
  describe-command <command-id>
  quickstart
  llmstxt
  validate-input <command-id> [--input <json>|@<file>]
  run <command-id> [--input <json>|@<file>]
  <command-id> [simple positional args]

Shorthand:
  xml.backend_capabilities
  xml.validate_document <file-path>
  xml.file_outline <file-path>
  xml.find_elements <file-path> <element-name>
  xml.replace_element_text <file-path> <element-name> <new-text>
  xml.parse_compare <file-path>

Common workflows:
  triage: xml.validate_document -> xml.file_outline --brief true
  locate: xml.find_elements -> xml.file_outline --brief false
  safe edit: xml.replace_element_text --apply false -> review -> --apply true -> xml.validate_document
  malformed analysis: xml.backend_capabilities -> xml.parse_compare

result.stdout:
# xmlcli llmstxt

One-shot bootstrap guide for XML/XAML coding workflows.

## Fast Start
1. xmlcli xml.validate_document <file-path>
2. xmlcli xml.file_outline <file-path> --brief true
3. xmlcli xml.find_elements <file-path> <element-name>
4. xmlcli xml.replace_element_text <file-path> <element-name> <new-text> --apply false
5. xmlcli xml.parse_compare <file-path>
6. xmlcli xml.backend_capabilities

## Intent Recipes
- Triage unknown file:
  1) xmlcli xml.validate_document <file-path>
  2) xmlcli xml.file_outline <file-path> --brief true --max-nodes 120
- Locate concrete edit targets:
  1) xmlcli xml.find_elements <file-path> <element-name> --max-results 40
  2) xmlcli xml.file_outline <file-path> --brief false --max-nodes 200
- Safe edit transaction:
  1) xmlcli xml.replace_element_text <file-path> <element-name> <new-text> --apply false
  2) review changes_preview / replaced_count / skipped_non_leaf_count
  3) rerun with --apply true
  4) xmlcli xml.validate_document <file-path>
- Malformed XML/XAML investigation:
  1) xmlcli xml.backend_capabilities
  2) xmlcli xml.parse_compare <file-path>
  3) xmlcli xml.file_outline <file-path> --backend language_xml --brief false --max-nodes 120

## Output Interpretation
- `xml.file_outline --brief true` returns summary counts and omits detailed nodes.
- Use `--brief false` when you need path/line/column node details.
- `xml.replace_element_text` edits leaf elements only.
- Check `replaced_count`, `skipped_non_leaf_count`, and `changes_preview` before apply.

## Scope Boundary
- `xmlcli` validates XML/XAML structure, not Roslyn semantic correctness.
- For `.xaml.cs` compile/diagnostic truth, run Roslyn/dotnet diagnostics in addition to xmlcli checks.

## Experimental Backend Mode
- Enable with: `XMLCLI_ENABLE_LANGUAGE_XML=1`
- Backend values: `xdocument` (default), `language_xml` (experimental)
- `language_xml` is read/simulate only. Writes require backend `xdocument`.
- Compare strict vs tolerant parse behavior: `xml.parse_compare`

## Commands
- `system.ping` (`read`): Health command for validating XML CLI command execution plumbing.
- `xml.backend_capabilities` (`read`): Report available XML parser backends, guarantees, and feature-flag status.
- `xml.file_outline` (`read`): Return a bounded structural outline of an XML document with line-aware node metadata.
- `xml.find_elements` (`read`): Find XML elements by local name with optional case sensitivity and bounded results.
- `xml.parse_compare` (`read`): Compare strict XDocument parsing against experimental language_xml parsing on the same file.
- `xml.replace_element_text` (`write`): Replace text of matching leaf XML elements with dry-run-by-default behavior.
- `xml.validate_document` (`read`): Validate XML parseability and structural summary using selected parser backend.

result.stdout:
{
  "Ok": true,
  "CommandId": "cli.quickstart",
  "Version": "1.0",
  "Preview": "cli.quickstart ok",
  "Data": {
    "first_minute_sequence": [
      "xmlcli llmstxt",
      "xmlcli list-commands --ids-only",
      "xmlcli xml.backend_capabilities",
      "xmlcli xml.validate_document App.xaml",
      "xmlcli xml.find_elements App.xaml Grid --max-results 20",
      "xmlcli xml.parse_compare App.xaml"
    ],
    "guardrails": [
      "Prefer read-only commands before edit commands.",
      "Use dry-run replace before --apply true.",
      "Keep responses bounded with max flags.",
      "language_xml backend is experimental and feature-gated by XMLCLI_ENABLE_LANGUAGE_XML=1.",
      "xmlcli is XML/XAML structure tooling; use Roslyn/dotnet diagnostics for .xaml.cs semantic correctness."
    ],
    "intent_recipes": {
      "triage": [
        "xmlcli xml.validate_document <file-path>",
        "xmlcli xml.file_outline <file-path> --brief true --max-nodes 120"
      ],
      "locate_targets": [
        "xmlcli xml.find_elements <file-path> <element-name> --max-results 40",
        "xmlcli xml.file_outline <file-path> --brief false --max-nodes 200"
      ],
      "safe_edit": [
        "xmlcli xml.replace_element_text <file-path> <element-name> <new-text> --apply false",
        "xmlcli xml.replace_element_text <file-path> <element-name> <new-text> --apply true",
        "xmlcli xml.validate_document <file-path>"
      ],
      "malformed_analysis": [
        "xmlcli xml.backend_capabilities",
        "xmlcli xml.parse_compare <file-path>",
        "xmlcli xml.file_outline <file-path> --backend language_xml --brief false --max-nodes 120"
      ]
    },
    "output_hints": [
      "xml.file_outline with --brief true returns summary counts and omits node list.",
      "Use --brief false when you need node path/line/column details.",
      "xml.replace_element_text edits leaf elements only; inspect skipped_non_leaf_count and replaced_count.",
      "backend=language_xml is read/simulate only and rejects apply=true writes."
    ]
  },
  "Telemetry": null,
  "Errors": [],
  "TraceId": null,
  "Summary": "cli.quickstart ok"
}
